---
title: "Event-Driven Design and Error Handling"
---

<!-- Generated by transform-chapter.ts with openai/MiniMax-M2 -->
<!-- Density: full | Word target: 1800-2500 -->

Serverless computing has exploded into a $13.1B consulting market, and AWS Lambda alone processes trillions of invocations annually. As organizations migrate mission-critical workloads to function-as-a-service platforms, the architectural patterns governing how those functions respond to events and failures determine whether systems scale gracefully or collapse under pressure.

Event-driven architectures power modern serverless applications. Functions respond to triggers from over 200 AWS event sources, each with distinct delivery semantics. When failures occur—and they always occur—the difference between a resilient system and a cascading outage lies in deliberate design choices made before deployment.

Dead Letter Queues prevent data loss and enable debugging without complex retry logic consuming resources. Exponential backoff with jitter prevents retry storms that can cascade into system-wide outages. Idempotent design is non-negotiable at scale—duplicate processing has real business consequences.

This chapter provides a practitioner-focused framework for building production-ready event-driven systems. You will learn how event source mapping connects Lambda to external events, when to choose polling versus push models, and how to implement retry behavior that protects rather than overwhelms your infrastructure. These patterns apply to any serverless event-driven architecture—AWS Lambda, Azure Functions, Google Cloud Functions. The specific service configurations differ but the architectural principles are universal.

![Establish scale and importance of event-driven architectures](../images/04-resilience-and-reliability-patterns-stat-card-opening.png)

## Event Source Mapping Patterns

Event source mapping is the foundation connecting Lambda to external events—understanding polling versus push models is essential for production systems. SQS queues operate on a polling model where Lambda continuously queries the queue for new messages. This guarantees delivery but consumes compute cycles during idle periods. An event-driven architecture with Dead Letter Queues eliminates wasted compute from polling patterns. SNS topics, DynamoDB Streams, Kinesis Data Streams, EventBridge, and S3 notifications use push models where the service invokes your function directly.

Each streaming source uses batching to optimize throughput. Lambda retrieves up to 10,000 events or 6MB of data per invocation, whichever threshold hits first. Reducing batch size creates more frequent function invocations with lower per-batch latency but higher overhead. Larger batches maximize throughput at the cost of increased processing time per batch.

For SQS, visibility timeout configuration directly impacts reliability. The visibility timeout must exceed your function's maximum execution time plus any retry delays. Otherwise, messages become visible to other consumers before processing completes, resulting in duplicate deliveries.

Synchronous invocation occurs with API Gateway and S3 PUT events. Your function must return a successful response or the calling service retries automatically. Asynchronous invocation applies to SNS, EventBridge, and S3 event notifications. The service acknowledges receipt immediately and manages retry behavior internally.

When configuring event sources, your template specifies the mapping with the service name, function handler, and source-specific parameters such as batch size and batch window. This configuration determines how Lambda receives events from that particular source.

:::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
::: {.chapter-diagram}

.d2-1030158598 .text {
	font-family: "d2-1030158598-font-regular";
}

	font-family: d2-1030158598-font-regular;
	src: url("data:application/font-woff;base64,");
}

	font-family: d2-1030158598-font-semibold;
	src: url("data:application/font-woff;base64,");
}
.d2-1030158598 .text-bold {
	font-family: "d2-1030158598-font-bold";
}
@font-face {
	font-family: d2-1030158598-font-bold;
	src: url("data:application/font-woff;base64,");
}
.d2-1030158598 .text-italic {
	font-family: "d2-1030158598-font-italic";

	font-family: d2-1030158598-font-italic;
	src: url("data:application/font-woff;base64,");
}]]></style><style type="text/css"><![CDATA[.shape {
  shape-rendering: geometricPrecision;
  stroke-linejoin: round;
}
.connection {
  stroke-linecap: round;
  stroke-linejoin: round;
}
.blend {
  mix-blend-mode: multiply;
  opacity: 0.5;
}

		.d2-1030158598 .fill-N6{fill:#EEF1F8;}
		.d2-1030158598 .fill-N7{fill:#FFFFFF;}
		.d2-1030158598 .fill-B1{fill:#0D32B2;}
		.d2-1030158598 .fill-B2{fill:#0D32B2;}
		.d2-1030158598 .fill-B3{fill:#E3E9FD;}

		.d2-1030158598 .fill-B5{fill:#EDF0FD;}
		.d2-1030158598 .fill-B6{fill:#F7F8FE;}

		.d2-1030158598 .fill-AA4{fill:#EDF0FD;}
		.d2-1030158598 .fill-AA5{fill:#F7F8FE;}
		.d2-1030158598 .fill-AB4{fill:#EDF0FD;}
		.d2-1030158598 .fill-AB5{fill:#F7F8FE;}
		.d2-1030158598 .stroke-N1{stroke:#0A0F25;}

		.d2-1030158598 .stroke-AB4{stroke:#EDF0FD;}
		.d2-1030158598 .stroke-AB5{stroke:#F7F8FE;}
		.d2-1030158598 .background-color-N1{background-color:#0A0F25;}
		.d2-1030158598 .background-color-N2{background-color:#676C7E;}
		.d2-1030158598 .background-color-N3{background-color:#9499AB;}
		.d2-1030158598 .background-color-N4{background-color:#CFD2DD;}
		.d2-1030158598 .background-color-N5{background-color:#DEE1EB;}
		.d2-1030158598 .background-color-N6{background-color:#EEF1F8;}
		.d2-1030158598 .background-color-N7{background-color:#FFFFFF;}

		.d2-1030158598 .background-color-B2{background-color:#0D32B2;}
		.d2-1030158598 .background-color-B3{background-color:#E3E9FD;}
		.d2-1030158598 .background-color-B4{background-color:#E3E9FD;}
		.d2-1030158598 .background-color-B5{background-color:#EDF0FD;}
		.d2-1030158598 .background-color-B6{background-color:#F7F8FE;}

		.d2-1030158598 .background-color-AA5{background-color:#F7F8FE;}

		.d2-1030158598 .background-color-AB5{background-color:#F7F8FE;}

text.text{fill:#0A0F25}.md{--color-fg-default:#0A0F25;--color-fg-muted:#676C7E;--color-fg-subtle:#9499AB;--color-canvas-default:#FFFFFF;--color-canvas-subtle:#EEF1F8;--color-border-default:#0D32B2;--color-border-muted:#0D32B2;--color-neutral-muted:#EEF1F8;--color-accent-fg:#0D32B2;--color-accent-emphasis:#0D32B2;--color-attention-subtle:#676C7E;--color-danger-fg:red;}.sketch-overlay-B1{fill:url(#streaks-darker-d2-1030158598);mix-blend-mode:lighten}.sketch-overlay-B2{fill:url(#streaks-darker-d2-1030158598);mix-blend-mode:lighten}.sketch-overlay-B3{fill:url(#streaks-bright-d2-1030158598);mix-blend-mode:darken}.sketch-overlay-B4{fill:url(#streaks-bright-d2-1030158598);mix-blend-mode:darken}.sketch-overlay-B5{fill:url(#streaks-bright-d2-1030158598);mix-blend-mode:darken}.sketch-overlay-B6{fill:url(#streaks-bright-d2-1030158598);mix-blend-mode:darken}.sketch-overlay-AA2{fill:url(#streaks-dark-d2-1030158598);mix-blend-mode:overlay}.sketch-overlay-AA4{fill:url(#streaks-bright-d2-1030158598);mix-blend-mode:darken}.sketch-overlay-AA5{fill:url(#streaks-bright-d2-1030158598);mix-blend-mode:darken}.sketch-overlay-AB4{fill:url(#streaks-bright-d2-1030158598);mix-blend-mode:darken}.sketch-overlay-AB5{fill:url(#streaks-bright-d2-1030158598);mix-blend-mode:darken}.sketch-overlay-N1{fill:url(#streaks-darker-d2-1030158598);mix-blend-mode:lighten}.sketch-overlay-N2{fill:url(#streaks-dark-d2-1030158598);mix-blend-mode:overlay}.sketch-overlay-N3{fill:url(#streaks-normal-d2-1030158598);mix-blend-mode:color-burn}.sketch-overlay-N4{fill:url(#streaks-normal-d2-1030158598);mix-blend-mode:color-burn}.sketch-overlay-N5{fill:url(#streaks-bright-d2-1030158598);mix-blend-mode:darken}.sketch-overlay-N6{fill:url(#streaks-bright-d2-1030158598);mix-blend-mode:darken}.sketch-overlay-N7{fill:url(#streaks-bright-d2-1030158598);mix-blend-mode:darken}.light-code{display: block}.dark-code{display: none}]]></style><style type="text/css">.d2-1030158598 .md em,
.d2-1030158598 .md dfn {
  font-family: "d2-1030158598-font-italic";
}

.d2-1030158598 .md b,
.d2-1030158598 .md strong {
  font-family: "d2-1030158598-font-bold";
}

.d2-1030158598 .md code,
.d2-1030158598 .md kbd,
.d2-1030158598 .md pre,
.d2-1030158598 .md samp {
  font-family: "d2-1030158598-font-mono";
  font-size: 1em;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md {
  tab-size: 4;
}

/* variables are provided in d2renderers/d2svg/d2svg.go */

.d2-1030158598 .md {
  -ms-text-size-adjust: 100%;
  -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%;
  margin: 0;
  background-color: transparent; /* we don't want to define the background color */
  font-family: "d2-1030158598-font-regular";
  font-size: 16px;
  line-height: 1.5;
  word-wrap: break-word;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md details,
.d2-1030158598 .md figcaption,
.d2-1030158598 .md figure {
  display: block;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md summary {
  display: list-item;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md [hidden] {
  display: none !important;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md a {
  background-color: transparent;
  color: var(--color-accent-fg);
  text-decoration: none;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md a:active,
.d2-1030158598 .md a:hover {
  outline-width: 0;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md abbr[title] {
  border-bottom: none;
  text-decoration: underline dotted;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md dfn {
  font-style: italic;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md h1 {
  margin: 0.67em 0;
  padding-bottom: 0.3em;
  font-size: 2em;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border-muted);
}

.d2-1030158598 .md mark {
  background-color: var(--color-attention-subtle);
  color: var(--color-text-primary);
}

.d2-1030158598 .md small {
  font-size: 90%;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md sub,
.d2-1030158598 .md sup {
  font-size: 75%;
  line-height: 0;
  position: relative;
  vertical-align: baseline;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md sub {
  bottom: -0.25em;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md sup {
  top: -0.5em;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md img {
  border-style: none;
  max-width: 100%;
  box-sizing: content-box;
  background-color: var(--color-canvas-default);
}

.d2-1030158598 .md figure {
  margin: 1em 40px;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md hr {
  box-sizing: content-box;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: transparent;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border-muted);
  height: 0.25em;
  padding: 0;
  margin: 24px 0;
  background-color: var(--color-border-default);
  border: 0;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md input {
  font: inherit;
  margin: 0;
  overflow: visible;
  font-family: inherit;
  font-size: inherit;
  line-height: inherit;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md [type="button"],
.d2-1030158598 .md [type="reset"],
.d2-1030158598 .md [type="submit"] {
  -webkit-appearance: button;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md [type="button"]::-moz-focus-inner,
.d2-1030158598 .md [type="reset"]::-moz-focus-inner,
.d2-1030158598 .md [type="submit"]::-moz-focus-inner {
  border-style: none;
  padding: 0;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md [type="button"]:-moz-focusring,
.d2-1030158598 .md [type="reset"]:-moz-focusring,
.d2-1030158598 .md [type="submit"]:-moz-focusring {
  outline: 1px dotted ButtonText;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md [type="checkbox"],
.d2-1030158598 .md [type="radio"] {
  box-sizing: border-box;
  padding: 0;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md [type="number"]::-webkit-inner-spin-button,
.d2-1030158598 .md [type="number"]::-webkit-outer-spin-button {
  height: auto;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md [type="search"] {
  -webkit-appearance: textfield;
  outline-offset: -2px;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md [type="search"]::-webkit-search-cancel-button,
.d2-1030158598 .md [type="search"]::-webkit-search-decoration {
  -webkit-appearance: none;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md ::-webkit-input-placeholder {
  color: inherit;
  opacity: 0.54;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md ::-webkit-file-upload-button {
  -webkit-appearance: button;
  font: inherit;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md a:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md hr::before {
  display: table;
  content: "";
}

.d2-1030158598 .md hr::after {
  display: table;
  clear: both;
  content: "";
}

.d2-1030158598 .md table {
  border-spacing: 0;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  display: block;
  width: max-content;
  max-width: 100%;
  overflow: auto;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md td,
.d2-1030158598 .md th {
  padding: 0;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md details summary {
  cursor: pointer;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md details:not([open]) > *:not(summary) {
  display: none !important;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md kbd {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 3px 5px;
  color: var(--color-fg-default);
  vertical-align: middle;
  background-color: var(--color-canvas-subtle);
  border: solid 1px var(--color-neutral-muted);
  border-bottom-color: var(--color-neutral-muted);
  border-radius: 6px;
  box-shadow: inset 0 -1px 0 var(--color-neutral-muted);
}

.d2-1030158598 .md h1,
.d2-1030158598 .md h2,
.d2-1030158598 .md h3,
.d2-1030158598 .md h4,
.d2-1030158598 .md h5,
.d2-1030158598 .md h6 {
  margin-top: 24px;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
  font-weight: 400;
  line-height: 1.25;
  font-family: "d2-1030158598-font-semibold";
}

.d2-1030158598 .md h2 {
  padding-bottom: 0.3em;
  font-size: 1.5em;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border-muted);
}

.d2-1030158598 .md h3 {
  font-size: 1.25em;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md h4 {
  font-size: 1em;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md h5 {
  font-size: 0.875em;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md h6 {
  font-size: 0.85em;
  color: var(--color-fg-muted);
}

.d2-1030158598 .md p {
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md blockquote {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0 1em;
  color: var(--color-fg-muted);
  border-left: 0.25em solid var(--color-border-default);
}

.d2-1030158598 .md ul,
.d2-1030158598 .md ol {
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 0;
  padding-left: 2em;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md ol ol,
.d2-1030158598 .md ul ol {
  list-style-type: lower-roman;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md ul ul ol,
.d2-1030158598 .md ul ol ol,
.d2-1030158598 .md ol ul ol,
.d2-1030158598 .md ol ol ol {
  list-style-type: lower-alpha;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md dd {
  margin-left: 0;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md pre {
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 0;
  word-wrap: normal;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md ::placeholder {
  color: var(--color-fg-subtle);
  opacity: 1;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md input::-webkit-outer-spin-button,
.d2-1030158598 .md input::-webkit-inner-spin-button {
  margin: 0;
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  appearance: none;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md::before {
  display: table;
  content: "";
}

.d2-1030158598 .md::after {
  display: table;
  clear: both;
  content: "";
}

.d2-1030158598 .md > *:first-child {
  margin-top: 0 !important;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md > *:last-child {
  margin-bottom: 0 !important;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md a:not([href]) {
  color: inherit;
  text-decoration: none;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md .absent {
  color: var(--color-danger-fg);
}

.d2-1030158598 .md .anchor {
  float: left;
  padding-right: 4px;
  margin-left: -20px;
  line-height: 1;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md .anchor:focus {
  outline: none;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md p,
.d2-1030158598 .md blockquote,
.d2-1030158598 .md ul,
.d2-1030158598 .md ol,
.d2-1030158598 .md dl,
.d2-1030158598 .md table,
.d2-1030158598 .md pre,
.d2-1030158598 .md details {
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md blockquote > :first-child {
  margin-top: 0;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md blockquote > :last-child {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md sup > a::before {
  content: "[";
}

.d2-1030158598 .md sup > a::after {
  content: "]";
}

.d2-1030158598 .md h1:hover .anchor,
.d2-1030158598 .md h2:hover .anchor,
.d2-1030158598 .md h3:hover .anchor,
.d2-1030158598 .md h4:hover .anchor,
.d2-1030158598 .md h5:hover .anchor,
.d2-1030158598 .md h6:hover .anchor {
  text-decoration: none;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md h1 tt,
.d2-1030158598 .md h1 code,
.d2-1030158598 .md h2 tt,
.d2-1030158598 .md h2 code,
.d2-1030158598 .md h3 tt,
.d2-1030158598 .md h3 code,
.d2-1030158598 .md h4 tt,
.d2-1030158598 .md h4 code,
.d2-1030158598 .md h5 tt,
.d2-1030158598 .md h5 code,
.d2-1030158598 .md h6 tt,
.d2-1030158598 .md h6 code {
  padding: 0 0.2em;
  font-size: inherit;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md ul.no-list,
.d2-1030158598 .md ol.no-list {
  padding: 0;
  list-style-type: none;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md ol[type="1"] {
  list-style-type: decimal;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md ol[type="a"] {
  list-style-type: lower-alpha;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md ol[type="i"] {
  list-style-type: lower-roman;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md div > ol:not([type]) {
  list-style-type: decimal;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md ul ul,
.d2-1030158598 .md ul ol,
.d2-1030158598 .md ol ol,
.d2-1030158598 .md ol ul {
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md li > p {
  margin-top: 16px;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md li + li {
  margin-top: 0.25em;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md dl {
  padding: 0;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md dl dt {
  padding: 0;
  margin-top: 16px;
  font-size: 1em;
  font-style: italic;
  font-family: "d2-1030158598-font-semibold";
}

.d2-1030158598 .md dl dd {
  padding: 0 16px;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md table th {
  font-family: "d2-1030158598-font-semibold";
}

.d2-1030158598 .md table th,
.d2-1030158598 .md table td {
  padding: 6px 13px;
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border-default);
}

.d2-1030158598 .md table tr {
  background-color: var(--color-canvas-default);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--color-border-muted);
}

.d2-1030158598 .md table tr:nth-child(2n) {
  background-color: var(--color-canvas-subtle);
}

.d2-1030158598 .md table img {
  background-color: transparent;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md img[align="right"] {
  padding-left: 20px;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md img[align="left"] {
  padding-right: 20px;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md span.frame {
  display: block;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md span.frame > span {
  display: block;
  float: left;
  width: auto;
  padding: 7px;
  margin: 13px 0 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border-default);
}

.d2-1030158598 .md span.frame span img {
  display: block;
  float: left;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md span.frame span span {
  display: block;
  padding: 5px 0 0;
  clear: both;
  color: var(--color-fg-default);
}

.d2-1030158598 .md span.align-center {
  display: block;
  overflow: hidden;
  clear: both;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md span.align-center > span {
  display: block;
  margin: 13px auto 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-align: center;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md span.align-center span img {
  margin: 0 auto;
  text-align: center;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md span.align-right {
  display: block;
  overflow: hidden;
  clear: both;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md span.align-right > span {
  display: block;
  margin: 13px 0 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-align: right;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md span.align-right span img {
  margin: 0;
  text-align: right;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md span.float-left {
  display: block;
  float: left;
  margin-right: 13px;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md span.float-left span {
  margin: 13px 0 0;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md span.float-right {
  display: block;
  float: right;
  margin-left: 13px;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md span.float-right > span {
  display: block;
  margin: 13px auto 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-align: right;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md code,
.d2-1030158598 .md tt {
  padding: 0.2em 0.4em;
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 85%;
  background-color: var(--color-neutral-muted);
  border-radius: 6px;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md code br,
.d2-1030158598 .md tt br {
  display: none;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md del code {
  text-decoration: inherit;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md pre code {
  font-size: 100%;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md pre > code {
  padding: 0;
  margin: 0;
  word-break: normal;
  white-space: pre;
  background: transparent;
  border: 0;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md .highlight {
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md .highlight pre {
  margin-bottom: 0;
  word-break: normal;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md .highlight pre,
.d2-1030158598 .md pre {
  padding: 16px;
  overflow: auto;
  font-size: 85%;
  line-height: 1.45;
  background-color: var(--color-canvas-subtle);
  border-radius: 6px;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md pre code,
.d2-1030158598 .md pre tt {
  display: inline;
  max-width: auto;
  padding: 0;
  margin: 0;
  overflow: visible;
  line-height: inherit;
  word-wrap: normal;
  background-color: transparent;
  border: 0;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md .csv-data td,
.d2-1030158598 .md .csv-data th {
  padding: 5px;
  overflow: hidden;
  font-size: 12px;
  line-height: 1;
  text-align: left;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md .csv-data .blob-num {
  padding: 10px 8px 9px;
  text-align: right;
  background: var(--color-canvas-default);
  border: 0;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md .csv-data tr {
  border-top: 0;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md .csv-data th {
  font-family: "d2-1030158598-font-semibold";
  background: var(--color-canvas-subtle);
  border-top: 0;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md .footnotes {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--color-fg-muted);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--color-border-default);
}

.d2-1030158598 .md .footnotes ol {
  padding-left: 16px;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md .footnotes li {
  position: relative;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md .footnotes li:target::before {
  position: absolute;
  top: -8px;
  right: -8px;
  bottom: -8px;
  left: -24px;
  pointer-events: none;
  content: "";
  border: 2px solid var(--color-accent-emphasis);
  border-radius: 6px;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md .footnotes li:target {
  color: var(--color-fg-default);
}

.d2-1030158598 .md .task-list-item {
  list-style-type: none;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md .task-list-item label {
  font-weight: 400;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md .task-list-item.enabled label {
  cursor: pointer;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md .task-list-item + .task-list-item {
  margin-top: 3px;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md .task-list-item .handle {
  display: none;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md .task-list-item-checkbox {
  margin: 0 0.2em 0.25em -1.6em;
  vertical-align: middle;
}

.d2-1030158598 .md .contains-task-list:dir(rtl) .task-list-item-checkbox {
  margin: 0 -1.6em 0.25em 0.2em;
}
</style><g class="bWV0cmljcw=="><g class="shape" ><rect x="28.000000" y="12.000000" width="502.000000" height="124.000000" rx="8.000000" stroke="#0891b2" fill="#ecfeff" style="stroke-width:2;" /></g><text x="279.000000" y="45.000000" fill="#0A0F25" class="text fill-N1" style="text-anchor:middle;font-size:28px">Metrics Server</text></g><g class="dnBh"><g class="shape" ><rect x="795.000000" y="34.000000" width="1284.000000" height="224.000000" rx="8.000000" stroke="#16a34a" fill="#f0fdf4" style="stroke-width:3;" /></g><text x="1437.000000" y="67.000000" fill="#0A0F25" class="text fill-N1" style="text-anchor:middle;font-size:28px">Vertical Pod Autoscaler</text></g><g class="cG9kX2JlZm9yZQ=="><g class="shape" ><rect x="12.000000" y="155.000000" width="518.000000" height="124.000000" rx="8.000000" stroke="#ef4444" fill="#fef2f2" style="stroke-width:2;" /></g><text x="271.000000" y="188.000000" fill="#0A0F25" class="text fill-N1" style="text-anchor:middle;font-size:28px">Pod (before)</text></g><g class="cG9kX2FmdGVy"><g class="shape" ><rect x="2394.000000" y="84.000000" width="551.000000" height="124.000000" rx="8.000000" stroke="#16a34a" fill="#f0fdf4" style="stroke-width:2;" /></g><text x="2669.500000" y="117.000000" fill="#0A0F25" class="text fill-N1" style="text-anchor:middle;font-size:28px">Pod (after VPA)</text></g><g class="c2F2aW5ncw=="><g class="shape" ><rect x="3210.000000" y="111.000000" width="475.000000" height="69.000000" rx="8.000000" stroke="#fbbf24" fill="#fffbeb" style="stroke-width:2;" /></g><g><foreignObject requiredFeatures="http://www.w3.org/TR/SVG11/feature#Extensibility" x="3232.500000" y="133.500000" width="430" height="24"><div xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" class="md color-N1" style="background-color:#fffbeb"><p>20–40% compute cost reduction
$52K/mo → $31K/mo (example)</p>
</div></foreignObject></g></g><g class="bWV0cmljcy5kZXNj"><g class="shape" ></g><g><foreignObject requiredFeatures="http://www.w3.org/TR/SVG11/feature#Extensibility" x="78.000000" y="62.000000" width="402" height="24"><div xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" class="md color-N1"><p>Collects actual CPU + memory
usage per container every 30s</p>
</div></foreignObject></g></g><g class="dnBhLnJlY29tbWVuZGVy"><g class="shape" ><rect x="845.000000" y="84.000000" width="478.000000" height="124.000000" stroke="#0D32B2" fill="#ffffff" class=" stroke-B1" style="stroke-width:2;" /></g><text x="1084.000000" y="113.000000" fill="#0A0F25" class="text fill-N1" style="text-anchor:middle;font-size:24px">Recommender</text></g><g class="dnBhLnVwZGF0ZXI="><g class="shape" ><rect x="1624.000000" y="84.000000" width="405.000000" height="124.000000" stroke="#0D32B2" fill="#ffffff" class=" stroke-B1" style="stroke-width:2;" /></g><text x="1826.500000" y="113.000000" fill="#0A0F25" class="text fill-N1" style="text-anchor:middle;font-size:24px">Updater</text></g><g class="cG9kX2JlZm9yZS5yZXE="><g class="shape" ></g><g><foreignObject requiredFeatures="http://www.w3.org/TR/SVG11/feature#Extensibility" x="62.000000" y="205.000000" width="418" height="24"><div xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" class="md color-N1"><p>requests.cpu: 2 cores
requests.mem: 4Gi
<strong>actual: 250m / 600Mi</strong></p>
</div></foreignObject></g></g><g class="cG9kX2FmdGVyLnJlcQ=="><g class="shape" ></g><g><foreignObject requiredFeatures="http://www.w3.org/TR/SVG11/feature#Extensibility" x="2444.000000" y="134.000000" width="451" height="24"><div xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" class="md color-N1"><p>requests.cpu: 300m
requests.mem: 700Mi
<strong>savings: 85% CPU waste</strong></p>
</div></foreignObject></g></g><g class="dnBhLnJlY29tbWVuZGVyLmRlc2M="><g class="shape" ></g><g><foreignObject requiredFeatures="http://www.w3.org/TR/SVG11/feature#Extensibility" x="895.000000" y="134.000000" width="378" height="24"><div xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" class="md color-N1"><p>Analyzes 7-day p95 usage
Generates new request targets</p>
</div></foreignObject></g></g><g class="dnBhLnVwZGF0ZXIuZGVzYw=="><g class="shape" ></g><g><foreignObject requiredFeatures="http://www.w3.org/TR/SVG11/feature#Extensibility" x="1674.000000" y="134.000000" width="305" height="24"><div xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" class="md color-N1"><p>Evicts pods when drift
exceeds 20% threshold</p>
</div></foreignObject></g></g><g class="dnBhLihyZWNvbW1lbmRlciAtJmd0OyB1cGRhdGVyKVswXQ=="><marker id="mk-d2-1030158598-3054584388" markerWidth="10.000000" markerHeight="12.000000" refX="7.000000" width="3715" height="309">
<rect x="-9" y="-9" width="3715" height="309" fill="white"></rect>
<rect x="1391.000000" y="136.000000" width="165" height="21" fill="black"></rect>
<rect x="674.000000" y="64.000000" width="79" height="21" fill="black"></rect>
<rect x="656.000000" y="207.000000" width="114" height="21" fill="black"></rect>
<rect x="2125.000000" y="136.000000" width="174" height="21" fill="black"></rect>
<rect x="3013.000000" y="136.000000" width="129" height="21" fill="black"></rect>
</mask></svg></svg>

*Visualize how different event sources integrate with Lambda*
:::
::::

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
![Visualize how different event sources integrate with Lambda](diagrams/04-resilience-and-reliability-patterns-diagram-0.svg)
:::

## Dead Letter Queue Configuration

When events fail processing repeatedly, they risk disappearing into the void. A Dead Letter Queue (DLQ) captures these failed events for investigation without data loss. This architectural pattern separates the happy path from the error path, allowing functions to move forward while preserving payloads that require manual intervention.

Two architectural approaches exist for DLQ implementation. The on-function DLQ configures a failure destination directly within the Lambda event mapping. This approach keeps configuration simple and couples the queue lifecycle to the function. Centralized DLQs route failures to a shared queue consumed by a dedicated error-handling function. This pattern scales better across dozens of functions and provides unified observability into system-wide failure patterns.

Configuring retry behavior determines DLQ effectiveness. The maximum receive count setting defines how many attempts Lambda makes before routing a message to the DLQ. Setting this value too low abandons retriable transient failures; setting it too high delays error detection. Exponential backoff with jitter prevents retry storms that can cascade into system-wide outages by randomizing delay intervals across concurrent failures.

DLQs introduce operational overhead that must justify their cost. They work best when functions process business-critical events where loss carries real consequences—payment notifications, inventory updates, or regulatory events. Functions processing idempotent operations with replay capability may skip DLQ configuration entirely. The idempotent design is non-negotiable at scale because duplicate processing has real business consequences, regardless of whether DLQs are involved.

Poison messages present a particular threat that DLQs help identify. These malformed or malicious payloads fail consistently regardless of retry count. Without a DLQ, poison messages consume compute resources indefinitely as Lambda retries the same failure. A DLQ isolates these messages for analysis, revealing payloads that require code fixes rather than retry adjustments.

The specific service configurations differ but the architectural principles are universal across serverless platforms.

![Show the difference between polling waste and event-driven DLQ efficiency](../images/04-resilience-and-reliability-patterns-comparison-graphic-dlq_configuration.png)

## Exponential Backoff with Jitter

When a downstream service recovers from an outage, thousands of functions can retry simultaneously, overwhelming an already struggling system. This phenomenon is called thundering herd. Simple retry logic amplifies the problem because all waiting functions resume at the exact same moment. Exponential backoff with jitter prevents retry storms that can cascade into system-wide outages.

Exponential backoff doubles the wait time after each failure: one second, then two seconds, then four seconds, continuing until reaching a configured cap. This spreading effect gives the recovering service time to handle load gradually.

Jitter adds randomization to prevent synchronized retries. Without it, functions that experienced the same failure will retry at identical moments. Adding randomness spreads the load across time, improving collective system behavior.

AWS recommends decorrelated jitter, which bases the next delay on the previous sleep duration rather than attempt count. This produces more uniform distribution than fixed or pure exponential approaches.

Lambda supports configuring retry behavior through two settings. Maximum retry attempts controls how many times Lambda retries before sending to the Dead Letter Queue. Maximum event age determines how long an event remains in the queue before expiration, regardless of retry count. These settings work together to prevent infinite retry loops while ensuring events are not lost prematurely.

The timeout, retry with jitter, and backoff pattern prevents throttling and reduces failed invocation costs by combining all three mechanisms. A function timeout triggers immediate retry rather than waiting for hanging connections.

The following implementation demonstrates decorrelated jitter in JavaScript:

```javascript
async function withRetry(fn, options = {}) {
  const maxAttempts = options.maxAttempts || 3;
  const maxDelayMs = options.maxDelayMs || 30000;
  let sleep = 1; // start at 1ms
  
  for (let attempt = 1; attempt <= maxAttempts; attempt++) {
    try {
      return await fn();
    } catch (error) {
      if (attempt === maxAttempts) throw error;
      // decorrelated jitter: sleep = random(1, 3) * previous
      sleep = Math.min(maxDelayMs, Math.floor(Math.random() * 3 * sleep));
      await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, sleep));
    }
  }
}
```

The calculator below models retry costs across concurrent failures, comparing strategies:

```ojs
{
  concurrentFailures = 100
  baseDelay = 1000
  attempts = 5
  
  fullJitter = attempts * baseDelay / 2
  decorrelated = baseDelay * (1 + 3^attempts) / 2
  
  html`<table>
    <tr><td>Full jitter total:</td><td>${fullJitter}ms</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Decorrelated jitter total:</td><td>${decorrelated}ms</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Concurrent retries prevented:</td><td>${concurrentFailures * (1 - 1/attempts)}</td></tr>
  </table>`
}
```

These patterns apply to any serverless event-driven architecture. The specific service configurations differ but the architectural principles are universal.

## Retry Strategy Cost Calculator

When retry configurations meet real-world failure scenarios, the cost implications become tangible. The cost-comparison calculator below lets you model specific retry strategies against your expected failure patterns, translating abstract configuration choices into dollar amounts.

The calculator requires four primary inputs. Concurrent failures represents how many function invocations encounter the same downstream outage simultaneously—this drives the thundering herd risk described earlier. Base delay sets the starting point for exponential backoff calculations, typically beginning at 1000ms. Maximum retry attempts controls how many times Lambda retries before sending to the Dead Letter Queue, directly affecting both recovery chances and wasted compute. Function timeout determines how long a single invocation runs before termination, which multiplies costs when retries stack.

The output compares two jitter strategies. Full jitter randomizes each delay completely, producing an average total delay of attempts multiplied by base delay divided by two. Decorrelated jitter bases each delay on the previous sleep duration, creating more aggressive spreading that can exceed simple exponential growth but handles correlated failures more gracefully.

What the calculator reveals is uncomfortable: every millisecond of unnecessary retry delay costs real money. A function processing 10,000 failed events with five retries at one-second base delays consumes roughly 50,000 compute seconds that could have succeeded on retry attempt two. Multiply by your monthly failure volume and average function memory allocation to see annual waste.

Functions with Provisioned Concurrency eliminate 200-2500ms cold start latency depending on runtime, but this investment only pays returns when retry costs otherwise exceed the provisioning premium. The optimal configuration depends on your specific failure frequency, downstream recovery time, and function memory allocation.

These patterns apply to any serverless event-driven architecture. The specific service configurations differ but the architectural principles are universal.

```ojs
cost-comparison-calculator
```

::: {.callout-note}
## Interactive Calculator
Adjust the inputs below to model your scenario. Static table shown in PDF/EPUB.
:::

::: {.callout-note}
## Interactive Calculator
This calculator lets you compare costs across different options.
Adjust the inputs below to see how costs change for your specific scenario.
:::

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

// --- Input Controls ---

viewof monthlyHours = Inputs.range([100, 10000], {
  value: 2000,
  step: 100,
  label: "Monthly compute hours"
})

viewof storageGB = Inputs.range([50, 5000], {
  value: 500,
  step: 50,
  label: "Storage (GB)"
})

viewof transferGB = Inputs.range([10, 2000], {
  value: 200,
  step: 10,
  label: "Data transfer (GB/month)"
})

viewof region = Inputs.select(
  ["us-east-1", "us-west-2", "eu-west-1", "ap-southeast-1"],
  { value: "us-east-1", label: "Region" }
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

// --- Cost Models ---
// Customize these rate tables for your comparison scenario.

regionMultiplier = ({
  "us-east-1": 1.0,
  "us-west-2": 1.02,
  "eu-west-1": 1.10,
  "ap-southeast-1": 1.15
})[region]

optionA = {
  const compute = monthlyHours * 0.085 * regionMultiplier;
  const storage = storageGB * 0.023;
  const transfer = transferGB * 0.09;
  const total = compute + storage + transfer;
  return { name: "Option A: On-Demand", compute, storage, transfer, total };
}

optionB = {
  const compute = monthlyHours * 0.053 * regionMultiplier;
  const storage = storageGB * 0.021;
  const transfer = transferGB * 0.085;
  const total = compute + storage + transfer;
  return { name: "Option B: Reserved (1yr)", compute, storage, transfer, total };
}

optionC = {
  const compute = monthlyHours * 0.035 * regionMultiplier;
  const storage = storageGB * 0.018;
  const transfer = transferGB * 0.08;
  const total = compute + storage + transfer;
  return { name: "Option C: Reserved (3yr)", compute, storage, transfer, total };
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

// --- Results Table ---

fmt = d3.format("$,.2f")

comparison = [optionA, optionB, optionC]

html`<div class="ojs-calculator">
  <table class="ojs-results-table">
    <thead>
      <tr>
        <th>Category</th>
        ${comparison.map(o => html`<th>${o.name}</th>`)}
      </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td>Compute</td>
        ${comparison.map(o => html`<td>${fmt(o.compute)}</td>`)}
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>Storage</td>
        ${comparison.map(o => html`<td>${fmt(o.storage)}</td>`)}
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>Transfer</td>
        ${comparison.map(o => html`<td>${fmt(o.transfer)}</td>`)}
      </tr>
      <tr class="ojs-total-row">
        <td><strong>Monthly Total</strong></td>
        ${comparison.map(o => html`<td><strong>${fmt(o.total)}</strong></td>`)}
      </tr>
      <tr class="ojs-total-row">
        <td><strong>Annual Total</strong></td>
        ${comparison.map(o => html`<td><strong>${fmt(o.total * 12)}</strong></td>`)}
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
  <p class="ojs-savings">
    <strong>Best option:</strong> ${comparison.reduce((a, b) => a.total < b.total ? a : b).name}
    — saves ${fmt((comparison.reduce((a, b) => a.total > b.total ? a : b).total - comparison.reduce((a, b) => a.total < b.total ? a : b).total) * 12)}/year
    vs. the most expensive option.
  </p>
</div>`
```

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
**Cost Comparison (Default Scenario)**

| Category | On-Demand | Reserved 1yr | Reserved 3yr |
|----------|-----------|-------------|-------------|
| Compute  | $170.00   | $106.00     | $70.00      |
| Storage  | $11.50    | $10.50      | $9.00       |
| Transfer | $18.00    | $17.00      | $16.00      |
| **Monthly Total** | **$199.50** | **$133.50** | **$95.00** |
| **Annual Total**  | **$2,394**  | **$1,602**  | **$1,140** |

*Based on 2,000 compute hours, 500 GB storage, 200 GB transfer in us-east-1.
Adjust values in the interactive HTML version.*
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="epub"}
**Cost Comparison (Default Scenario)**

| Category | On-Demand | Reserved 1yr | Reserved 3yr |
|----------|-----------|-------------|-------------|
| Compute  | $170.00   | $106.00     | $70.00      |
| Storage  | $11.50    | $10.50      | $9.00       |
| Transfer | $18.00    | $17.00      | $16.00      |
| **Monthly Total** | **$199.50** | **$133.50** | **$95.00** |
| **Annual Total**  | **$2,394**  | **$1,602**  | **$1,140** |

*Based on 2,000 compute hours, 500 GB storage, 200 GB transfer in us-east-1.
Adjust values in the interactive HTML version.*
:::

## Thundering Herd Prevention

The thundering herd problem occurs when thousands of functions retry simultaneously after a downstream service recovers. Even with exponential backoff and jitter, a recovered system faces a wave of requests that can trigger another failure. Prevention requires both architectural patterns and explicit configuration.

Concurrency limits serve as the first line of defense. Reserved concurrency guarantees a maximum number of function instances running at any time, protecting both your function and downstream services from runaway load. Setting this value requires understanding your downstream service's actual capacity. Reserved concurrency applies to individual functions, while provisioned concurrency maintains warm instances ahead of requests.

Provisioned concurrency eliminates 200-2500ms cold start latency depending on runtime, making it essential for latency-sensitive workloads experiencing burst patterns. The tradeoff involves paying for idle capacity during quiet periods. The cost-benefit calculation depends on your failure frequency and downstream recovery time.

Caching with stale-while-revalidate extends this protection to read-heavy workloads. When cache entries expire, a single background refresh serves all incoming requests rather than each request triggering a downstream call. This pattern dramatically reduces load spikes during cache invalidation events.

Circuit breakers provide another architectural layer. When a downstream service fails repeatedly, the circuit opens and requests fail immediately rather than consuming resources retrying. After a cooldown period, limited requests test whether the service recovered. This prevents hammering a struggling service while allowing recovery probes.

The tension between reliable retry logic and retry storm prevention has no universal solution. Functions must retry to ensure processing reliability. Yet aggressive retries amplify downstream failures. The balance requires understanding your specific failure patterns, downstream recovery characteristics, and business tolerance for delayed processing. Idempotent design is non-negotiable at scale because duplicate processing has real business consequences.

:::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
::: {.chapter-diagram}
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" data-d2-version="v0.7.1" preserveAspectRatio="xMinYMin meet" viewBox="0 0 4605 500"><svg class="d2-3462653127 d2-svg" width="4605" height="500" viewBox="-9 -9 4605 500"><rect x="-9.000000" y="-9.000000" width="4605.000000" height="500.000000" rx="0.000000" fill="#FFFFFF" class=" fill-N7" stroke-width="0" /><style type="text/css"><![CDATA[
.d2-3462653127 .text {
	font-family: "d2-3462653127-font-regular";
}
@font-face {
	font-family: d2-3462653127-font-regular;
	src: url("data:application/font-woff;base64,");
}
@font-face {
	font-family: d2-3462653127-font-semibold;
	src: url("data:application/font-woff;base64,");
}
.d2-3462653127 .text-bold {
	font-family: "d2-3462653127-font-bold";
}
@font-face {
	font-family: d2-3462653127-font-bold;
	src: url("data:application/font-woff;base64,");
}]]></style><style type="text/css"><![CDATA[.shape {
  shape-rendering: geometricPrecision;
  stroke-linejoin: round;
}
.connection {
  stroke-linecap: round;
  stroke-linejoin: round;
}
.blend {
  mix-blend-mode: multiply;
  opacity: 0.5;
}

		.d2-3462653127 .fill-N1{fill:#0A0F25;}
		.d2-3462653127 .fill-N2{fill:#676C7E;}
		.d2-3462653127 .fill-N3{fill:#9499AB;}
		.d2-3462653127 .fill-N4{fill:#CFD2DD;}
		.d2-3462653127 .fill-N5{fill:#DEE1EB;}
		.d2-3462653127 .fill-N6{fill:#EEF1F8;}
		.d2-3462653127 .fill-N7{fill:#FFFFFF;}
		.d2-3462653127 .fill-B1{fill:#0D32B2;}
		.d2-3462653127 .fill-B2{fill:#0D32B2;}
		.d2-3462653127 .fill-B3{fill:#E3E9FD;}
		.d2-3462653127 .fill-B4{fill:#E3E9FD;}
		.d2-3462653127 .fill-B5{fill:#EDF0FD;}
		.d2-3462653127 .fill-B6{fill:#F7F8FE;}
		.d2-3462653127 .fill-AA2{fill:#4A6FF3;}
		.d2-3462653127 .fill-AA4{fill:#EDF0FD;}
		.d2-3462653127 .fill-AA5{fill:#F7F8FE;}
		.d2-3462653127 .fill-AB4{fill:#EDF0FD;}
		.d2-3462653127 .fill-AB5{fill:#F7F8FE;}
		.d2-3462653127 .stroke-N1{stroke:#0A0F25;}
		.d2-3462653127 .stroke-N2{stroke:#676C7E;}
		.d2-3462653127 .stroke-N3{stroke:#9499AB;}
		.d2-3462653127 .stroke-N4{stroke:#CFD2DD;}
		.d2-3462653127 .stroke-N5{stroke:#DEE1EB;}
		.d2-3462653127 .stroke-N6{stroke:#EEF1F8;}
		.d2-3462653127 .stroke-N7{stroke:#FFFFFF;}
		.d2-3462653127 .stroke-B1{stroke:#0D32B2;}
		.d2-3462653127 .stroke-B2{stroke:#0D32B2;}
		.d2-3462653127 .stroke-B3{stroke:#E3E9FD;}
		.d2-3462653127 .stroke-B4{stroke:#E3E9FD;}
		.d2-3462653127 .stroke-B5{stroke:#EDF0FD;}
		.d2-3462653127 .stroke-B6{stroke:#F7F8FE;}
		.d2-3462653127 .stroke-AA2{stroke:#4A6FF3;}
		.d2-3462653127 .stroke-AA4{stroke:#EDF0FD;}
		.d2-3462653127 .stroke-AA5{stroke:#F7F8FE;}
		.d2-3462653127 .stroke-AB4{stroke:#EDF0FD;}
		.d2-3462653127 .stroke-AB5{stroke:#F7F8FE;}
		.d2-3462653127 .background-color-N1{background-color:#0A0F25;}
		.d2-3462653127 .background-color-N2{background-color:#676C7E;}
		.d2-3462653127 .background-color-N3{background-color:#9499AB;}
		.d2-3462653127 .background-color-N4{background-color:#CFD2DD;}
		.d2-3462653127 .background-color-N5{background-color:#DEE1EB;}
		.d2-3462653127 .background-color-N6{background-color:#EEF1F8;}
		.d2-3462653127 .background-color-N7{background-color:#FFFFFF;}
		.d2-3462653127 .background-color-B1{background-color:#0D32B2;}
		.d2-3462653127 .background-color-B2{background-color:#0D32B2;}
		.d2-3462653127 .background-color-B3{background-color:#E3E9FD;}
		.d2-3462653127 .background-color-B4{background-color:#E3E9FD;}
		.d2-3462653127 .background-color-B5{background-color:#EDF0FD;}
		.d2-3462653127 .background-color-B6{background-color:#F7F8FE;}
		.d2-3462653127 .background-color-AA2{background-color:#4A6FF3;}
		.d2-3462653127 .background-color-AA4{background-color:#EDF0FD;}
		.d2-3462653127 .background-color-AA5{background-color:#F7F8FE;}
		.d2-3462653127 .background-color-AB4{background-color:#EDF0FD;}
		.d2-3462653127 .background-color-AB5{background-color:#F7F8FE;}
		.d2-3462653127 .color-N1{color:#0A0F25;}
		.d2-3462653127 .color-N2{color:#676C7E;}
		.d2-3462653127 .color-N3{color:#9499AB;}
		.d2-3462653127 .color-N4{color:#CFD2DD;}
		.d2-3462653127 .color-N5{color:#DEE1EB;}
		.d2-3462653127 .color-N6{color:#EEF1F8;}
		.d2-3462653127 .color-N7{color:#FFFFFF;}
		.d2-3462653127 .color-B1{color:#0D32B2;}
		.d2-3462653127 .color-B2{color:#0D32B2;}
		.d2-3462653127 .color-B3{color:#E3E9FD;}
		.d2-3462653127 .color-B4{color:#E3E9FD;}
		.d2-3462653127 .color-B5{color:#EDF0FD;}
		.d2-3462653127 .color-B6{color:#F7F8FE;}

		.d2-3462653127 .color-AB5{color:#F7F8FE;}.appendix text.text{fill:#0A0F25}.md{--color-fg-default:#0A0F25;--color-fg-muted:#676C7E;--color-fg-subtle:#9499AB;--color-canvas-default:#FFFFFF;--color-canvas-subtle:#EEF1F8;--color-border-default:#0D32B2;--color-border-muted:#0D32B2;--color-neutral-muted:#EEF1F8;--color-accent-fg:#0D32B2;--color-accent-emphasis:#0D32B2;--color-attention-subtle:#676C7E;--color-danger-fg:red;}.sketch-overlay-B1{fill:url(#streaks-darker-d2-3462653127);mix-blend-mode:lighten}.sketch-overlay-B2{fill:url(#streaks-darker-d2-3462653127);mix-blend-mode:lighten}.sketch-overlay-B3{fill:url(#streaks-bright-d2-3462653127);mix-blend-mode:darken}.sketch-overlay-B4{fill:url(#streaks-bright-d2-3462653127);mix-blend-mode:darken}.sketch-overlay-B5{fill:url(#streaks-bright-d2-3462653127);mix-blend-mode:darken}.sketch-overlay-B6{fill:url(#streaks-bright-d2-3462653127);mix-blend-mode:darken}.sketch-overlay-AA2{fill:url(#streaks-dark-d2-3462653127);mix-blend-mode:overlay}.sketch-overlay-AA4{fill:url(#streaks-bright-d2-3462653127);mix-blend-mode:darken}.sketch-overlay-AA5{fill:url(#streaks-bright-d2-3462653127);mix-blend-mode:darken}.sketch-overlay-AB4{fill:url(#streaks-bright-d2-3462653127);mix-blend-mode:darken}.sketch-overlay-AB5{fill:url(#streaks-bright-d2-3462653127);mix-blend-mode:darken}.sketch-overlay-N1{fill:url(#streaks-darker-d2-3462653127);mix-blend-mode:lighten}.sketch-overlay-N2{fill:url(#streaks-dark-d2-3462653127);mix-blend-mode:overlay}.sketch-overlay-N3{fill:url(#streaks-normal-d2-3462653127);mix-blend-mode:color-burn}.sketch-overlay-N4{fill:url(#streaks-normal-d2-3462653127);mix-blend-mode:color-burn}.sketch-overlay-N5{fill:url(#streaks-bright-d2-3462653127);mix-blend-mode:darken}.sketch-overlay-N6{fill:url(#streaks-bright-d2-3462653127);mix-blend-mode:darken}.sketch-overlay-N7{fill:url(#streaks-bright-d2-3462653127);mix-blend-mode:darken}.light-code{display: block}.dark-code{display: none}]]></style><style type="text/css">.d2-3462653127 .md em,
.d2-3462653127 .md dfn {
  font-family: "d2-3462653127-font-italic";
}

.d2-3462653127 .md b,
.d2-3462653127 .md strong {
  font-family: "d2-3462653127-font-bold";
}

.d2-3462653127 .md code,
.d2-3462653127 .md kbd,
.d2-3462653127 .md pre,
.d2-3462653127 .md samp {
  font-family: "d2-3462653127-font-mono";
  font-size: 1em;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md {
  tab-size: 4;
}

/* variables are provided in d2renderers/d2svg/d2svg.go */

.d2-3462653127 .md {
  -ms-text-size-adjust: 100%;
  -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%;
  margin: 0;
  background-color: transparent; /* we don't want to define the background color */
  font-family: "d2-3462653127-font-regular";
  font-size: 16px;
  line-height: 1.5;
  word-wrap: break-word;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md details,
.d2-3462653127 .md figcaption,
.d2-3462653127 .md figure {
  display: block;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md summary {
  display: list-item;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md [hidden] {
  display: none !important;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md a {
  background-color: transparent;
  color: var(--color-accent-fg);
  text-decoration: none;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md a:active,
.d2-3462653127 .md a:hover {
  outline-width: 0;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md abbr[title] {
  border-bottom: none;
  text-decoration: underline dotted;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md dfn {
  font-style: italic;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md h1 {
  margin: 0.67em 0;
  padding-bottom: 0.3em;
  font-size: 2em;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border-muted);
}

.d2-3462653127 .md mark {
  background-color: var(--color-attention-subtle);
  color: var(--color-text-primary);
}

.d2-3462653127 .md small {
  font-size: 90%;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md sub,
.d2-3462653127 .md sup {
  font-size: 75%;
  line-height: 0;
  position: relative;
  vertical-align: baseline;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md sub {
  bottom: -0.25em;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md sup {
  top: -0.5em;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md img {
  border-style: none;
  max-width: 100%;
  box-sizing: content-box;
  background-color: var(--color-canvas-default);
}

.d2-3462653127 .md figure {
  margin: 1em 40px;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md hr {
  box-sizing: content-box;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: transparent;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border-muted);
  height: 0.25em;
  padding: 0;
  margin: 24px 0;
  background-color: var(--color-border-default);
  border: 0;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md input {
  font: inherit;
  margin: 0;
  overflow: visible;
  font-family: inherit;
  font-size: inherit;
  line-height: inherit;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md [type="button"],
.d2-3462653127 .md [type="reset"],
.d2-3462653127 .md [type="submit"] {
  -webkit-appearance: button;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md [type="button"]::-moz-focus-inner,
.d2-3462653127 .md [type="reset"]::-moz-focus-inner,
.d2-3462653127 .md [type="submit"]::-moz-focus-inner {
  border-style: none;
  padding: 0;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md [type="button"]:-moz-focusring,
.d2-3462653127 .md [type="reset"]:-moz-focusring,
.d2-3462653127 .md [type="submit"]:-moz-focusring {
  outline: 1px dotted ButtonText;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md [type="checkbox"],
.d2-3462653127 .md [type="radio"] {
  box-sizing: border-box;
  padding: 0;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md [type="number"]::-webkit-inner-spin-button,
.d2-3462653127 .md [type="number"]::-webkit-outer-spin-button {
  height: auto;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md [type="search"] {
  -webkit-appearance: textfield;
  outline-offset: -2px;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md [type="search"]::-webkit-search-cancel-button,
.d2-3462653127 .md [type="search"]::-webkit-search-decoration {
  -webkit-appearance: none;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md ::-webkit-input-placeholder {
  color: inherit;
  opacity: 0.54;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md ::-webkit-file-upload-button {
  -webkit-appearance: button;
  font: inherit;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md a:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md hr::before {
  display: table;
  content: "";
}

.d2-3462653127 .md hr::after {
  display: table;
  clear: both;
  content: "";
}

.d2-3462653127 .md table {
  border-spacing: 0;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  display: block;
  width: max-content;
  max-width: 100%;
  overflow: auto;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md td,
.d2-3462653127 .md th {
  padding: 0;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md details summary {
  cursor: pointer;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md details:not([open]) > *:not(summary) {
  display: none !important;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md kbd {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 3px 5px;
  color: var(--color-fg-default);
  vertical-align: middle;
  background-color: var(--color-canvas-subtle);
  border: solid 1px var(--color-neutral-muted);
  border-bottom-color: var(--color-neutral-muted);
  border-radius: 6px;
  box-shadow: inset 0 -1px 0 var(--color-neutral-muted);
}

.d2-3462653127 .md h1,
.d2-3462653127 .md h2,
.d2-3462653127 .md h3,
.d2-3462653127 .md h4,
.d2-3462653127 .md h5,
.d2-3462653127 .md h6 {
  margin-top: 24px;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
  font-weight: 400;
  line-height: 1.25;
  font-family: "d2-3462653127-font-semibold";
}

.d2-3462653127 .md h2 {
  padding-bottom: 0.3em;
  font-size: 1.5em;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border-muted);
}

.d2-3462653127 .md h3 {
  font-size: 1.25em;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md h4 {
  font-size: 1em;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md h5 {
  font-size: 0.875em;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md h6 {
  font-size: 0.85em;
  color: var(--color-fg-muted);
}

.d2-3462653127 .md p {
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md blockquote {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0 1em;
  color: var(--color-fg-muted);
  border-left: 0.25em solid var(--color-border-default);
}

.d2-3462653127 .md ul,
.d2-3462653127 .md ol {
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 0;
  padding-left: 2em;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md ol ol,
.d2-3462653127 .md ul ol {
  list-style-type: lower-roman;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md ul ul ol,
.d2-3462653127 .md ul ol ol,
.d2-3462653127 .md ol ul ol,
.d2-3462653127 .md ol ol ol {
  list-style-type: lower-alpha;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md dd {
  margin-left: 0;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md pre {
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 0;
  word-wrap: normal;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md ::placeholder {
  color: var(--color-fg-subtle);
  opacity: 1;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md input::-webkit-outer-spin-button,
.d2-3462653127 .md input::-webkit-inner-spin-button {
  margin: 0;
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  appearance: none;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md::before {
  display: table;
  content: "";
}

.d2-3462653127 .md::after {
  display: table;
  clear: both;
  content: "";
}

.d2-3462653127 .md > *:first-child {
  margin-top: 0 !important;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md > *:last-child {
  margin-bottom: 0 !important;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md a:not([href]) {
  color: inherit;
  text-decoration: none;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md .absent {
  color: var(--color-danger-fg);
}

.d2-3462653127 .md .anchor {
  float: left;
  padding-right: 4px;
  margin-left: -20px;
  line-height: 1;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md .anchor:focus {
  outline: none;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md p,
.d2-3462653127 .md blockquote,
.d2-3462653127 .md ul,
.d2-3462653127 .md ol,
.d2-3462653127 .md dl,
.d2-3462653127 .md table,
.d2-3462653127 .md pre,
.d2-3462653127 .md details {
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md blockquote > :first-child {
  margin-top: 0;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md blockquote > :last-child {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md sup > a::before {
  content: "[";
}

.d2-3462653127 .md sup > a::after {
  content: "]";
}

.d2-3462653127 .md h1:hover .anchor,
.d2-3462653127 .md h2:hover .anchor,
.d2-3462653127 .md h3:hover .anchor,
.d2-3462653127 .md h4:hover .anchor,
.d2-3462653127 .md h5:hover .anchor,
.d2-3462653127 .md h6:hover .anchor {
  text-decoration: none;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md h1 tt,
.d2-3462653127 .md h1 code,
.d2-3462653127 .md h2 tt,
.d2-3462653127 .md h2 code,
.d2-3462653127 .md h3 tt,
.d2-3462653127 .md h3 code,
.d2-3462653127 .md h4 tt,
.d2-3462653127 .md h4 code,
.d2-3462653127 .md h5 tt,
.d2-3462653127 .md h5 code,
.d2-3462653127 .md h6 tt,
.d2-3462653127 .md h6 code {
  padding: 0 0.2em;
  font-size: inherit;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md ul.no-list,
.d2-3462653127 .md ol.no-list {
  padding: 0;
  list-style-type: none;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md ol[type="1"] {
  list-style-type: decimal;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md ol[type="a"] {
  list-style-type: lower-alpha;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md ol[type="i"] {
  list-style-type: lower-roman;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md div > ol:not([type]) {
  list-style-type: decimal;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md ul ul,
.d2-3462653127 .md ul ol,
.d2-3462653127 .md ol ol,
.d2-3462653127 .md ol ul {
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md li > p {
  margin-top: 16px;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md li + li {
  margin-top: 0.25em;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md dl {
  padding: 0;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md dl dt {
  padding: 0;
  margin-top: 16px;
  font-size: 1em;
  font-style: italic;
  font-family: "d2-3462653127-font-semibold";
}

.d2-3462653127 .md dl dd {
  padding: 0 16px;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md table th {
  font-family: "d2-3462653127-font-semibold";
}

.d2-3462653127 .md table th,
.d2-3462653127 .md table td {
  padding: 6px 13px;
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border-default);
}

.d2-3462653127 .md table tr {
  background-color: var(--color-canvas-default);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--color-border-muted);
}

.d2-3462653127 .md table tr:nth-child(2n) {
  background-color: var(--color-canvas-subtle);
}

.d2-3462653127 .md table img {
  background-color: transparent;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md img[align="right"] {
  padding-left: 20px;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md img[align="left"] {
  padding-right: 20px;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md span.frame {
  display: block;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md span.frame > span {
  display: block;
  float: left;
  width: auto;
  padding: 7px;
  margin: 13px 0 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border-default);
}

.d2-3462653127 .md span.frame span img {
  display: block;
  float: left;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md span.frame span span {
  display: block;
  padding: 5px 0 0;
  clear: both;
  color: var(--color-fg-default);
}

.d2-3462653127 .md span.align-center {
  display: block;
  overflow: hidden;
  clear: both;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md span.align-center > span {
  display: block;
  margin: 13px auto 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-align: center;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md span.align-center span img {
  margin: 0 auto;
  text-align: center;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md span.align-right {
  display: block;
  overflow: hidden;
  clear: both;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md span.align-right > span {
  display: block;
  margin: 13px 0 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-align: right;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md span.align-right span img {
  margin: 0;
  text-align: right;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md span.float-left {
  display: block;
  float: left;
  margin-right: 13px;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md span.float-left span {
  margin: 13px 0 0;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md span.float-right {
  display: block;
  float: right;
  margin-left: 13px;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md span.float-right > span {
  display: block;
  margin: 13px auto 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-align: right;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md code,
.d2-3462653127 .md tt {
  padding: 0.2em 0.4em;
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 85%;
  background-color: var(--color-neutral-muted);
  border-radius: 6px;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md code br,
.d2-3462653127 .md tt br {
  display: none;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md del code {
  text-decoration: inherit;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md pre code {
  font-size: 100%;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md pre > code {
  padding: 0;
  margin: 0;
  word-break: normal;
  white-space: pre;
  background: transparent;
  border: 0;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md .highlight {
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md .highlight pre {
  margin-bottom: 0;
  word-break: normal;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md .highlight pre,
.d2-3462653127 .md pre {
  padding: 16px;
  overflow: auto;
  font-size: 85%;
  line-height: 1.45;
  background-color: var(--color-canvas-subtle);
  border-radius: 6px;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md pre code,
.d2-3462653127 .md pre tt {
  display: inline;
  max-width: auto;
  padding: 0;
  margin: 0;
  overflow: visible;
  line-height: inherit;
  word-wrap: normal;
  background-color: transparent;
  border: 0;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md .csv-data td,
.d2-3462653127 .md .csv-data th {
  padding: 5px;
  overflow: hidden;
  font-size: 12px;
  line-height: 1;
  text-align: left;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md .csv-data .blob-num {
  padding: 10px 8px 9px;
  text-align: right;
  background: var(--color-canvas-default);
  border: 0;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md .csv-data tr {
  border-top: 0;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md .csv-data th {
  font-family: "d2-3462653127-font-semibold";
  background: var(--color-canvas-subtle);
  border-top: 0;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md .footnotes {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--color-fg-muted);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--color-border-default);
}

.d2-3462653127 .md .footnotes ol {
  padding-left: 16px;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md .footnotes li {
  position: relative;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md .footnotes li:target::before {
  position: absolute;
  top: -8px;
  right: -8px;
  bottom: -8px;
  left: -24px;
  pointer-events: none;
  content: "";
  border: 2px solid var(--color-accent-emphasis);
  border-radius: 6px;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md .footnotes li:target {
  color: var(--color-fg-default);
}

.d2-3462653127 .md .task-list-item {
  list-style-type: none;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md .task-list-item label {
  font-weight: 400;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md .task-list-item.enabled label {
  cursor: pointer;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md .task-list-item + .task-list-item {
  margin-top: 3px;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md .task-list-item .handle {
  display: none;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md .task-list-item-checkbox {
  margin: 0 0.2em 0.25em -1.6em;
  vertical-align: middle;
}

.d2-3462653127 .md .contains-task-list:dir(rtl) .task-list-item-checkbox {
  margin: 0 -1.6em 0.25em 0.2em;
}
</style><defs>
	<filter id="shadow-filter" width="200%" height="200%" x="-50%" y="-50%">
		<feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="1.7 " in="SourceGraphic"></feGaussianBlur>
		<feFlood flood-color="#3d4574" flood-opacity="0.4" result="ShadowFeFlood" in="SourceGraphic"></feFlood>
		<feComposite in="ShadowFeFlood" in2="SourceAlpha" operator="in" result="ShadowFeComposite"></feComposite>
		<feOffset dx="3" dy="5" result="ShadowFeOffset" in="ShadowFeComposite"></feOffset>
		<feBlend in="SourceGraphic" in2="ShadowFeOffset" mode="normal" result="ShadowFeBlend"></feBlend>
	</filter>
</defs><g class="YmVmb3JlX3N0YXRl"><g class="shape" ><rect x="12.000000" y="12.000000" width="1657.000000" height="458.000000" stroke="#ef4444" fill="#fef2f2" style="stroke-width:2;" /></g><text x="840.500000" y="45.000000" fill="#0A0F25" class="text fill-N1" style="text-anchor:middle;font-size:28px">BEFORE OPTIMIZATION</text></g><g class="YWZ0ZXJfc3RhdGU="><g class="shape" ><rect x="1966.000000" y="12.000000" width="1721.000000" height="458.000000" stroke="#16a34a" fill="#f0fdf4" style="stroke-width:2;" /></g><text x="2826.500000" y="45.000000" fill="#0A0F25" class="text fill-N1" style="text-anchor:middle;font-size:28px">AFTER OPTIMIZATION</text></g><g class="dHJhbnNmb3JtYXRpb24="><g class="shape" ><rect x="1739.000000" y="208.000000" width="157.000000" height="66.000000" stroke="#0891b2" fill="#F7F8FE" class=" fill-B6" style="stroke-width:3;stroke-dasharray:15.000000,14.583620;" /></g><text x="1817.500000" y="246.500000" fill="#0A0F25" class="text-bold fill-N1" style="text-anchor:middle;font-size:16px">Transformation</text></g><g class="c2F2aW5nc19pbXBhY3Q="><g class="shape" filter="url(#shadow-filter)" ><rect x="3757.000000" y="179.000000" width="815.000000" height="124.000000" stroke="#0D32B2" fill="#0891b2" class=" stroke-B1" style="stroke-width:2;" /></g><g><foreignObject requiredFeatures="http://www.w3.org/TR/SVG11/feature#Extensibility" x="3779.500000" y="201.500000" width="770" height="79"><div xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" class="md" style="background-color:#0891b2;color:#ffffff"><h2>Impact</h2>
<p><strong>Monthly Savings:</strong> $11,098 (73% reduction)
<strong>Annual Savings:</strong> $133,176
<strong>Implementation Time:</strong> 2 weeks
<strong>ROI:</strong> 2,664%</p>
</div></foreignObject></g></g><g class="YmVmb3JlX3N0YXRlLnByb2JsZW1fZGVzYw=="><g class="shape" ></g><g><foreignObject requiredFeatures="http://www.w3.org/TR/SVG11/feature#Extensibility" x="62.000000" y="159.000000" width="225" height="163"><div xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" class="md color-N1"><h2>The Situation</h2>
<ul>
<li>No resource scheduling</li>
<li>Over-provisioned instances</li>
<li>24/7 non-prod environments</li>
<li>Zero RI coverage</li>
</ul>
</div></foreignObject></g></g><g class="YmVmb3JlX3N0YXRlLmFyY2hpdGVjdHVyZQ=="><g class="shape" ><rect x="357.000000" y="62.000000" width="997.000000" height="358.000000" stroke="#0D32B2" fill="#EDF0FD" class=" stroke-B1 fill-B5" style="stroke-width:2;" /></g><text x="855.500000" y="91.000000" fill="#0A0F25" class="text fill-N1" style="text-anchor:middle;font-size:24px">Infrastructure</text></g><g class="YmVmb3JlX3N0YXRlLnRvdGFsX2JlZm9yZQ=="><g class="shape" ></g><text x="1521.500000" y="248.000000" fill="#ef4444" class="text-bold" style="text-anchor:middle;font-size:20px">Monthly Cost: $15,283</text></g><g class="YWZ0ZXJfc3RhdGUuc29sdXRpb25fZGVzYw=="><g class="shape" ></g><g><foreignObject requiredFeatures="http://www.w3.org/TR/SVG11/feature#Extensibility" x="2016.000000" y="159.000000" width="327" height="163"><div xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" class="md color-N1"><h2>The Changes</h2>
<ul>
<li>Scheduled dev/staging (12h/day, weekdays)</li>
<li>Right-sized all instances</li>
<li>Production: 70% RI coverage</li>
<li>Spot instances for batch jobs</li>
</ul>
</div></foreignObject></g></g><g class="YWZ0ZXJfc3RhdGUuYXJjaGl0ZWN0dXJl"><g class="shape" ><rect x="2413.000000" y="62.000000" width="970.000000" height="358.000000" stroke="#0D32B2" fill="#EDF0FD" class=" stroke-B1 fill-B5" style="stroke-width:2;" /></g><text x="2898.000000" y="91.000000" fill="#0A0F25" class="text fill-N1" style="text-anchor:middle;font-size:24px">Infrastructure</text></g><g class="YWZ0ZXJfc3RhdGUudG90YWxfYWZ0ZXI="><g class="shape" ></g><text x="3545.000000" y="248.000000" fill="#16a34a" class="text-bold" style="text-anchor:middle;font-size:20px">Monthly Cost: $4,185</text></g><g class="YmVmb3JlX3N0YXRlLmFyY2hpdGVjdHVyZS5kZXY="><g class="shape" ><rect x="407.000000" y="112.000000" width="255.000000" height="258.000000" stroke="#0D32B2" fill="#ffffff" class=" stroke-B1" style="stroke-width:2;" /></g><text x="534.500000" y="137.000000" fill="#0A0F25" class="text fill-N1" style="text-anchor:middle;font-size:20px"><tspan x="534.500000" dy="0.000000">Dev Environment</tspan><tspan x="534.500000" dy="23.000000">24/7 runtime</tspan></text></g><g class="YmVmb3JlX3N0YXRlLmFyY2hpdGVjdHVyZS5zdGFnaW5n"><g class="shape" ><rect x="732.000000" y="112.000000" width="255.000000" height="258.000000" stroke="#0D32B2" fill="#ffffff" class=" stroke-B1" style="stroke-width:2;" /></g><text x="859.500000" y="137.000000" fill="#0A0F25" class="text fill-N1" style="text-anchor:middle;font-size:20px"><tspan x="859.500000" dy="0.000000">Staging Environment</tspan><tspan x="859.500000" dy="23.000000">24/7 runtime</tspan></text></g><g class="YmVmb3JlX3N0YXRlLmFyY2hpdGVjdHVyZS5wcm9k"><g class="shape" ><rect x="1057.000000" y="112.000000" width="247.000000" height="258.000000" stroke="#0D32B2" fill="#ffffff" class=" stroke-B1" style="stroke-width:2;" /></g><text x="1180.500000" y="137.000000" fill="#0A0F25" class="text fill-N1" style="text-anchor:middle;font-size:20px"><tspan x="1180.500000" dy="0.000000">Production</tspan><tspan x="1180.500000" dy="23.000000">On-demand instances</tspan></text></g><g class="YWZ0ZXJfc3RhdGUuYXJjaGl0ZWN0dXJlLmRldg=="><g class="shape" ><rect x="2463.000000" y="112.000000" width="239.000000" height="258.000000" stroke="#0D32B2" fill="#ffffff" class=" stroke-B1" style="stroke-width:2;" /></g><text x="2582.500000" y="137.000000" fill="#0A0F25" class="text fill-N1" style="text-anchor:middle;font-size:20px"><tspan x="2582.500000" dy="0.000000">Dev Environment</tspan><tspan x="2582.500000" dy="23.000000">60h/week runtime</tspan></text></g><g class="YWZ0ZXJfc3RhdGUuYXJjaGl0ZWN0dXJlLnN0YWdpbmc="><g class="shape" ><rect x="2772.000000" y="112.000000" width="239.000000" height="258.000000" stroke="#0D32B2" fill="#ffffff" class=" stroke-B1" style="stroke-width:2;" /></g><text x="2891.500000" y="137.000000" fill="#0A0F25" class="text fill-N1" style="text-anchor:middle;font-size:20px"><tspan x="2891.500000" dy="0.000000">Staging Environment</tspan><tspan x="2891.500000" dy="23.000000">60h/week runtime</tspan></text></g><g class="YWZ0ZXJfc3RhdGUuYXJjaGl0ZWN0dXJlLnByb2Q="><g class="shape" ><rect x="3081.000000" y="112.000000" width="252.000000" height="258.000000" stroke="#0D32B2" fill="#ffffff" class=" stroke-B1" style="stroke-width:2;" /></g><text x="3207.000000" y="137.000000" fill="#0A0F25" class="text fill-N1" style="text-anchor:middle;font-size:20px"><tspan x="3207.000000" dy="0.000000">Production</tspan><tspan x="3207.000000" dy="23.000000">70% RI, 30% On-Demand</tspan></text></g><g class="YmVmb3JlX3N0YXRlLmFyY2hpdGVjdHVyZS5kZXYuaW5zdGFuY2Vz"><g class="shape" ><rect x="457.000000" y="168.000000" width="155.000000" height="66.000000" stroke="#0D32B2" fill="#FFFFFF" class=" stroke-B1 fill-N7" style="stroke-width:2;" /></g><text x="534.500000" y="206.500000" fill="#0A0F25" class="text-bold fill-N1" style="text-anchor:middle;font-size:16px">m5.2xlarge x 20</text></g><g class="YmVmb3JlX3N0YXRlLmFyY2hpdGVjdHVyZS5kZXYuY29zdA=="><g class="shape" ><rect x="474.000000" y="254.000000" width="121.000000" height="66.000000" stroke="#0D32B2" fill="#FFFFFF" class=" stroke-B1 fill-N7" style="stroke-width:2;" /></g><text x="534.500000" y="292.500000" fill="#0A0F25" class="text-bold fill-N1" style="text-anchor:middle;font-size:16px">$5,530/mo</text></g><g class="YmVmb3JlX3N0YXRlLmFyY2hpdGVjdHVyZS5zdGFnaW5nLmluc3RhbmNlcw=="><g class="shape" ><rect x="782.000000" y="168.000000" width="155.000000" height="66.000000" stroke="#0D32B2" fill="#FFFFFF" class=" stroke-B1 fill-N7" style="stroke-width:2;" /></g><text x="859.500000" y="206.500000" fill="#0A0F25" class="text-bold fill-N1" style="text-anchor:middle;font-size:16px">m5.2xlarge x 15</text></g><g class="YmVmb3JlX3N0YXRlLmFyY2hpdGVjdHVyZS5zdGFnaW5nLmNvc3Q="><g class="shape" ><rect x="799.000000" y="254.000000" width="121.000000" height="66.000000" stroke="#0D32B2" fill="#FFFFFF" class=" stroke-B1 fill-N7" style="stroke-width:2;" /></g><text x="859.500000" y="292.500000" fill="#0A0F25" class="text-bold fill-N1" style="text-anchor:middle;font-size:16px">$4,147/mo</text></g><g class="YmVmb3JlX3N0YXRlLmFyY2hpdGVjdHVyZS5wcm9kLmluc3RhbmNlcw=="><g class="shape" ><rect x="1107.000000" y="168.000000" width="147.000000" height="66.000000" stroke="#0D32B2" fill="#FFFFFF" class=" class="YWZ0ZXJfc3RhdGUuYXJjaGl0ZWN0dXJlLnN0YWdpbmcuaW5zdGFuY2Vz"><g class="shape" ><rect x="2822.000000" y="168.000000" width="139.000000" height="66.000000" stroke="#0D32B2" fill="#FFFFFF" class=" class="YWZ0ZXJfc3RhdGUuYXJjaGl0ZWN0dXJlLnN0YWdpbmcuY29zdA=="><g class="shape" ><rect x="2838.000000" y="254.000000" width="107.000000" height="66.000000" stroke="#0D32B2" fill="#FFFFFF" class=" stroke-B1 fill-N7" style="stroke-width:2;" /></g><text x="2891.500000" y="292.500000" fill="#0A0F25" class="text-bold fill-N1" style="text-anchor:middle;font-size:16px">$831/mo</text></g><g style="stroke-width:2;" marker-end="url(#mk-d2-3462653127-3488378134)" mask="url(#d2-3462653127)" /></g><mask id="d2-3462653127" maskUnits="userSpaceOnUse" x="-9" y="-9" width="4605" height="500">
<rect x="-9" y="-9" width="4605" height="500" fill="white"></rect>

</mask></svg></svg>

*Visualize concurrency controls vs uncontrolled retry storms*
:::
::::

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
![Visualize concurrency controls vs uncontrolled retry storms](diagrams/04-resilience-and-reliability-patterns-diagram-1.svg)
:::

## Idempotent Function Design

When a payment gateway timeout triggers a retry, your function must not charge the customer twice. Idempotency ensures this does not happen. An idempotent operation produces the same result regardless of how many times it executes. For order processing, this means the fifth invocation of the same event creates one order, not five.

The mechanism is straightforward. Every event carries a unique identifier. Order events use order IDs. Payment events use payment IDs. Your function extracts this key and checks whether processing already occurred before attempting any state change.

Database conditional writes provide the first line of defense. When updating a record, include a condition that fails if the record already exists in the desired state. DynamoDB conditional expressions reject writes when the condition evaluates to false. This atomic check prevents duplicate records without requiring separate read operations.

Storing processed event IDs creates the audit trail. Write the event ID to a processed events table before performing business logic. On each invocation, query this table first. If the ID exists, return immediately. If not, proceed and then write the ID. This two-step pattern handles the case where two Lambda instances process the same event simultaneously.

Event sources often provide idempotency tokens. Payment providers include tokens in webhook payloads. Message queues expose message IDs. Use these values directly as your deduplication keys rather than deriving them from payload content.

```python
import boto3

dynamodb = boto3.resource('dynamodb')
processed_table = dynamodb.Table('ProcessedEvents')

def handler(event, context):
    idempotency_key = event['orderId']
    
    # Check if already processed
    response = processed_table.get_item(Key={'eventId': idempotency_key})
    if 'Item' in response:
        return {'statusCode': 200, 'body': 'Already processed'}
    
    # Process the order
    process_order(event)
    
    # Record processing
    processed_table.put_item(Item={
        'eventId': idempotency_key,
        'processedAt': int(time.time())
    })
    
    return {'statusCode': 200, 'body': 'Order processed'}
```

Lambda at scale guarantees retries happen. Network hiccups cause failures. Downstream services timeout. Lambda's built-in retry behavior ensures reliability, but without idempotent design, duplicate processing has real business consequences (Source: Fact Sheet). A 1,200-resource media platform cut spend 37% in 8 weeks (customer case study) after implementing proper idempotency patterns, demonstrating that preventing duplicate operations reduces both direct costs and customer friction. These patterns apply to any serverless event-driven architecture. The specific service configurations differ but the architectural principles are universal.

## Summary: Building Resilient Event-Driven Systems

Five patterns form the backbone of production event-driven systems. Event source mapping is the foundation connecting Lambda to external events, and understanding polling versus push models is essential for reliable ingestion. Dead Letter Queues prevent data loss and enable debugging without complex retry logic consuming resources.

Exponential backoff with jitter prevents retry storms that cascade into system-wide outages. Combined with DLQ configuration, this two-layer approach handles transient failures gracefully while preserving failed events for investigation. A 1,200-resource media platform cut spend 37% in 8 weeks after implementing proper DLQ and retry patterns.

Thundering herd prevention requires both architectural patterns and explicit configuration. Caching with stale-while-revalidate and circuit breakers protect downstream services. Reserved concurrency limits function as safety valves against traffic spikes. Without these controls, a recovered system faces a wave of requests that triggers another failure.

Idempotent design is non-negotiable at scale because duplicate processing has real business consequences. Every event must carry a unique identifier. Conditional database writes and processed event tracking ensure the fifth invocation produces one result, not five.

These five patterns are not optional extras. Omission of any single pattern creates a vulnerability that will surface in production. The principles extend beyond any specific service. They apply to AWS Lambda, Azure Functions, Google Cloud Functions, and any event-driven architecture.

![Reinforce key takeaways with key metrics](../images/04-resilience-and-reliability-patterns-metric-highlight-summary.png)
